name: Glabrezu

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
traits.text: If the glabrezu dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The glabrezu has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

text:
# Glabrezu

*Large Fiend (Demon), Chaotic Evil*

A four-armed demon of temptation that offers power with pincered hands.

### Actions

**Pincer.** Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 10 ft. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) Slashing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 15) from one of two pincers.

**Pummel.** Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17, one creature Grappled by the glabrezu. Failure: 15 (3d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. Success: Half damage.
